title: helianthemum nummularium var. mutabile
intro: Helianthemum nummularium var. mutabile, commonly known as a subvariety of rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Helianthemum nummularium var. mutabile is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
